Data Privacy

A Better Way to Process Files

Stop doing things the old way. Automate your entire workflow.

🔴 The Old Way

  • ✕ Process one file at a time
  • ✕ Re-upload for every new task
  • ✕ Manual repetitive settings
  • ✕ Files uploaded to unknown servers
  • ✕ Limited to single operations
VS

⚡ The TidyFlow Way

  • ✓ Batch process 100+ files at once
  • ✓ Chain multiple steps in pipelines
  • ✓ Save presets, reuse forever
  • ✓ 100% client-side — nothing leaves your browser
  • ✓ Automate compress + convert + rename in one go

Two Powerful Workflows

Use individual tools instantly, or build automated pipelines for complex tasks.

🛠️

Individual Tools

Pick a tool, drop your files, get results instantly. Perfect for quick one-off tasks.

Browse Tools
⚡

Automation Pipelines

Chain operations into a pipeline. Process hundreds of files through multiple steps.

Build Pipeline

Everything You Need

Powerful tools that run entirely in your browser.

📦

Smart Compression

Up to 80% smaller files with near-zero quality loss. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP & SVG.

🔄

Format Conversion

Convert between 193+ format pairs. HEIC to JPG, WebP to PNG, SVG to PNG, and more.

📋

Bulk Processing

Drop up to 100 files at once. Batch compress, convert, resize, and rename in seconds.

🔒

Client-Side Security

Zero uploads. All processing happens locally in your browser. GDPR & CCPA compliant.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are my files safe?

+

Absolutely. All processing happens 100% in your browser. No files are ever uploaded to any server. Your data never leaves your device.

How does client-side processing work?

+

We use modern browser APIs like Canvas, OffscreenCanvas, and WebAssembly to process images directly in your browser. Zero server involvement, maximum privacy.

What is a "credit"?

+

Each file operation (compress, convert, resize, etc.) uses 1 credit. Free users get 10 credits per day. Paid plans offer more credits for higher-volume needs.

Is there a file size limit?

+

Free plan supports files up to 20MB. Standard supports 50MB, and Pro has no practical limit (depends on your device's memory).

What formats are supported?

+

We support PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, GIF, HEIC, and more. Our converter handles 193+ format conversion pairs.

How does the automation pipeline work?

+

Add processing steps (resize, compress, convert, rename, etc.) to a pipeline. Drop your files in, and they'll be processed through each step sequentially. Save pipelines as presets to reuse.

Ready to Run Your Flow?

Start processing images for free. No sign-up required.
